function.name: get_example_block
function.description: Get a template/example block for a specific use case.

function.name: inject_block
function.description: Add a new block to the viewer.

function.name: update_block
function.description: Update an existing block by its ID.

id.description: The ID of the block to update.

updates.description: Partial block object containing fields to update.

function.name: remove_block
function.description: Remove a block from the viewer.

id.description: The ID of the block to remove.

function.name: clear_all_blocks
function.description: Remove all blocks from the current viewer configuration.

function.name: get_current_traffic_data
function.description: Get the request and response data (headers and body) for the currently selected test traffic. This helps you understand the schema to generate appropriate UI.

function.name: reorder_blocks
function.description: Reorder the blocks in the viewer. Provide the complete list of block IDs in the desired order.

blockIds.description: The ordered list of block IDs.

function.name: set_test_traffic
function.description: Select a specific network request (traffic ID) to use as the data source for previewing the viewer.

trafficId.description: The ID of the traffic item to select.

testSource.description: Whether to use live traffic or a saved session.

sessionId.description: The ID of the session (required if testSource is 'session').
